name: Sour Dough Starter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour and dry yeast. Stir until well mixed.
2. In another bowl, mix the honey with the warm water until dissolved.
3. Gradually add the wet mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring continuously.
4. Transfer the dough to an earthenware pot and cover loosely.
5. Store at room temperature for 1-7 days, feeding daily by adding equal parts flour and water until active and bubbly.
